title: We’re releasing prompt-based teen safety policies for gpt-oss-safeguard. They’re designed to help you identify and moderate teen-specific content, and turn safety requirements into classifiers for real-time filtering or offline analysis. https://openai.com/index/teen-safety-policies-gpt-oss-safeguard
